leadText: The Gold Cup (Japanese: ゴールドチタンカップ Gold Titanium Cup) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Gold Cup serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A popular option among hikers. It's made with titanium, so it doesn't rust even if it's used to hold drinks with high sodium content.
